ramp_complaints.name: Pedestrian Ramp Complaints
ramp_complaints.description: This dataset tracks corner and pedestrian ramp complaints and their temporary repair status. Temporary repairs may include but are not limited to the use of asphalt on corners and pedestrian ramps.

ramp_locations.name: Pedestrian Ramp Locations
ramp_locations.description:
Pedestrian ramps provide access on and off streets and sidewalks and are an essential tool for all pedestrians. This data is a comprehensive list of all pedestrian ramps throughout New York City.
